006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.flow;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.net.*;
022import java.util.*;
023import java.util.function.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.*;
026
027import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.*;
028import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.auth.*;
029import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.http.*;
030import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.id.*;
031import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.token.*;
032
033/**
034 * Refresh-token grant (RFC 6749 &sect;6) flow helper.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * Wraps Nimbus's {@link RefreshTokenGrant}.  The IdP may return a rotated refresh token; callers should
038 * persist the {@link OAuthToken#refreshToken()} value if present.
039 *
040 * @since 10.0.0
041 */
042@SuppressWarnings({
043   "java:S1192" // Duplicate string literals are OAuth protocol parameter names (e.g. "grant_type", "refresh_token"); intentional
044})
045public class OAuthRefreshTokenFlow {
046
047   /**
048    * Static creator.
049    *
050    * @return A new builder.
051    */
052   public static Builder create() {
053      return new Builder();
054   }
055
056   /**
057    * Builder.
058    */
059   public static class Builder {
060      private URI tokenEndpoint;
061      private String clientId;
062      private Supplier<String> clientSecretSupplier;
063      private String refreshToken;
064      private Set<String> scopes = new LinkedHashSet<>();
065      private Consumer<HTTPRequest> httpRequestConfigurator;
066
067      /** Constructor. */
068      protected Builder() {}
069
070      /**
071       * Sets the token endpoint URL.  Required.
072       *
073       * @param value The endpoint.
074       * @return This object.
075       */
076      public Builder tokenEndpoint(URI value) {
077         tokenEndpoint = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
078         return this;
079      }
080
081      /**
082       * Sets the OAuth client ID.  Required.
083       *
084       * @param value The client ID.
085       * @return This object.
086       */
087      public Builder clientId(String value) {
088         clientId = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
089         return this;
090      }
091
092      /**
093       * Sets the OAuth client secret.  May be omitted for public clients.
094       *
095       * @param value The secret.
096       * @return This object.
097       */
098      public Builder clientSecret(String value) {
099         assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
100         clientSecretSupplier = () -> value;
101         return this;
102      }
103
104      /**
105       * Sets the OAuth client secret via a supplier.
106       *
107       * @param value The supplier.
108       * @return This object.
109       */
110      public Builder clientSecretSupplier(Supplier<String> value) {
111         clientSecretSupplier = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
112         return this;
113      }
114
115      /**
116       * Sets the refresh-token value.  Required.
117       *
118       * @param value The refresh token.
119       * @return This object.
120       */
121      public Builder refreshToken(String value) {
122         refreshToken = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
123         return this;
124      }
125
126      /**
127       * Adds optional scope narrowing.
128       *
129       * @param values The scopes.
130       * @return This object.
131       */
132      public Builder scope(String... values) {
133         assertArgNotNull("values", values);
134         for (var v : values) {
135            assertArgNotNullOrBlank("scope", v);
136            scopes.add(v);
137         }
138         return this;
139      }
140
141      /**
142       * Sets the HTTP request configurator.
143       *
144       * @param value The callback.
145       * @return This object.
146       */
147      public Builder httpRequestConfigurator(Consumer<HTTPRequest> value) {
148         httpRequestConfigurator = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
149         return this;
150      }
151
152      /**
153       * Builds the flow.
154       *
155       * @return A new {@link OAuthRefreshTokenFlow}.
156       */
157      public OAuthRefreshTokenFlow build() {
158         if (tokenEndpoint == null)
159            throw new IllegalStateException("OAuthRefreshTokenFlow requires tokenEndpoint(...)");
160         if (clientId == null)
161            throw new IllegalStateException("OAuthRefreshTokenFlow requires clientId(...)");
162         if (refreshToken == null)
163            throw new IllegalStateException("OAuthRefreshTokenFlow requires refreshToken(...)");
164         return new OAuthRefreshTokenFlow(this);
165      }
166   }
167
168   private final URI tokenEndpoint;
169   private final String clientId;
170   private final Supplier<String> clientSecretSupplier;
171   private final String refreshToken;
172   private final Set<String> scopes;
173   private final Consumer<HTTPRequest> httpRequestConfigurator;
174
175   /**
176    * Constructor.
177    *
178    * @param b The builder.
179    */
180   protected OAuthRefreshTokenFlow(Builder b) {
181      this.tokenEndpoint = b.tokenEndpoint;
182      this.clientId = b.clientId;
183      this.clientSecretSupplier = b.clientSecretSupplier;
184      this.refreshToken = b.refreshToken;
185      this.scopes = Collections.unmodifiableSet(new LinkedHashSet<>(b.scopes));
186      this.httpRequestConfigurator = b.httpRequestConfigurator;
187   }
188
189   /**
190    * Acquires a fresh access token.
191    *
192    * @return The acquired token.
193    */
194   public OAuthToken acquire() {
195      var grant = new RefreshTokenGrant(new RefreshToken(refreshToken));
196      Scope nimbusScope = scopes.isEmpty() ? null : new Scope(scopes.toArray(new String[0]));
197      TokenRequest req;
198      if (clientSecretSupplier != null) {
199         var clientAuth = new ClientSecretBasic(new ClientID(clientId), new Secret(clientSecretSupplier.get()));
200         req = new TokenRequest.Builder(tokenEndpoint, clientAuth, grant)
201            .scope(nimbusScope)
202            .build();
203      } else {
204         req = new TokenRequest.Builder(tokenEndpoint, new ClientID(clientId), grant)
205            .scope(nimbusScope)
206            .build();
207      }
208      return Flows.send(req, httpRequestConfigurator);
209   }
210}
